report.summary: Day 71 standup v11: Build-2 shipped Tokenized Treasuries RWA Yield Guide (~3,200 words) + interactive Funding Rate Tracker tool (644-line component) — both added to PUBLISH_QUEUE (replacing promoted Onchain Identity + Leveraged Tokens). Design-v10 created 7 missing OG images + UX/accessibility fixes on Tax-Loss & Cold Storage guides. Community-v9 drafted 5 posts (Solana SDP launch thread, Day 47 Fear divergence, CLARITY Act countdown, new guides drop, SDP poll) + newsletter v19 + 2 SVG cards. EOD-v10 confirmed zero new regressions, 758 uncommitted items. 494 published slugs, 2 in queue. BTC $71,043 (+4%), F&G 8-11 (Extreme Fear Day 46-47). Git locks Day 8 — deploy gap ~179 pages. 53 agent runs today.

sections.title: Analytics
items: DELTA SINCE STANDUP v10: 4 agents ran (build-2, community-v9, design-v10, eod-v10). 53 total runs today (standup×11, build×8, design×10, community×9, publish×5, eod×10).

PUBLISH_QUEUE ROTATED: Onchain Identity + Leveraged Tokens promoted out of queue. Build-2 refilled with Tokenized Treasuries RWA Yield Guide + Funding Rate Tracker. Pipeline continuous: queue never stays empty for long.

PUBLISHED SLUGS: 494 in PUBLISHED_PAGES (+2 from v10 via promotion). 2 pages in PUBLISH_QUEUE. ~315 live in production (stale Mar 17 commit e999560). Deploy gap: ~179 pages (36% of declared content invisible to Google).

BUILD CYCLE OUTPUT: Tokenized Treasuries & RWA Yield Guide 2026 (~3,200 words, covers BlackRock BUIDL, Circle USYC, Ondo USDY/OUSG, Franklin BENJI, $5.8B+ market, 4.2-5.5% APY, 6 FAQs) + Funding Rate Tracker tool (644-line interactive component with cross-exchange comparison for 10 tokens × 6 exchanges, search/filter/sort, summary stats, color-coded rates).

DESIGN CYCLE 10 OUTPUT: Created 7 missing OG images (Leveraged Tokens, Tokenized Treasuries, Advanced Staking, Polymarket, Scroll zkEVM, Onchain Identity, Sei Network). UX audit on Tax-Loss + Cold Storage guides — accessibility fixes (aria-labels, role=alert, nav landmarks, font size bumps to 14px WCAG AA).

COMMUNITY CYCLE 9 OUTPUT: 5 social posts (Solana SDP launch breaking thread with Mastercard/Western Union/Worldpay, Day 47 Fear divergence, new guides drop, CLARITY Act countdown, SDP impact poll), newsletter v19 ('Mastercard Is Building on Solana'), 2 SVG cards (SDP launch + Day 47 Fear divergence), Discord/TG evening update.

EOD CYCLE 10: Zero-delta verification cycle — no new commits or deploys. 758 uncommitted items (+10 from v9, all reports). Confirmed 2 items in PUBLISH_QUEUE. 46 TS errors unchanged. 5/6 API routes healthy.

MARKET UPDATE: BTC $71,043 (+4% relief rally from $68K support). ETH ~$2,160 (+5-10%). F&G 8-11 (Extreme Fear — Day 46-47, longest since FTX). $336M 24hr liquidations. Spot BTC ETF $129M net outflows (but $1.3B+ March inflows, $128B AUM). Stablecoins $304-320B ATH. SOL stablecoin $15.7B ATH. BREAKING: Solana Developer Platform launched with Mastercard/Western Union/Worldpay as enterprise users. CLARITY Act Senate review active this week.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: DONE SINCE STANDUP v10: build-2 (Tokenized Treasuries guide + Funding Rate Tracker tool), design-v10 (7 OG images + UX fixes), community-v9 (5 posts + newsletter v19 + 2 SVGs), eod-v10 (verification). 4 agents ran = $397 human-equivalent.

PIPELINE HEALTH: PUBLISH_QUEUE at 2 items (Tokenized Treasuries, Funding Rate Tracker). Build pipeline maintaining continuous output — queue refilled within one cycle of draining. 57+ guides built, 61+ OG images, 121+ social posts, 48+ SVG cards, 19 newsletters.
TOTAL INVENTORY: 494 published slugs in PUBLISHED_PAGES. 1,142 page.tsx files locally. ~315 live in production (stale Mar 17 commit e999560). Deploy gap: ~179 pages.

BLOCKER [P0 — DAY 8]: Git locks (.git/HEAD.lock + .git/index.lock) still present since Mar 16. 758 uncommitted files. ALL content since Mar 17 is local-only. Jefe action required: rm .git/index.lock .git/HEAD.lock → git add . → git commit → git push.
BLOCKER [P1]: /api/market-metrics returns 404 in production — route.ts exists locally but never committed.
CARRY-OVER [P1]: /trading and /trading/learn return 404 — hub page.tsx missing.
CARRY-OVER [P1]: TS errors at 46 across 3 files (crypto-arbitrage unescaped >, crypto-index-funds, structured-data.examples.ts).
CARRY-OVER [P1]: Rate limiter coverage 2/8 API routes. Core data routes unprotected.
CARRY-OVER [P2]: Style inconsistency — some guides use Tailwind, others use inline styles. Future refactor.
TODAY'S AGENT RUNS: standup×11, build×8, design×10, community×9, publish×5, eod×10 = 53 runs.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — CLEAR GIT LOCKS + DEPLOY 179-PAGE BACKLOG: Deploy gap now at ~179 pages (494 declared vs ~315 live). 8 days of content invisible to Google. BTC $71K + F&G Day 47 extreme fear divergence + Solana SDP launch + CLARITY Act Senate review THIS WEEK = peak search demand window. One unlock + push = 57% content increase deployed instantly. Tax-Loss Harvesting guide has 3-week window before April 15 deadline closes.

PRIORITY 2 — PROMOTE TOKENIZED TREASURIES + FUNDING RATE TRACKER: 2 new items in PUBLISH_QUEUE. Tokenized Treasuries captures $5.8B+ RWA market narrative compounding with Solana SDP launch (WisdomTree + Ondo on Solana). Funding Rate Tracker is an interactive tool — tools drive retention and backlinks. Promote both and deploy with the backlog push.

PRIORITY 3 — CAPITALIZE ON SOLANA SDP LAUNCH: Solana Developer Platform launched TODAY with Mastercard, Western Union, Worldpay. This is the #1 crypto story of the day. Our Solana Ecosystem Guide is already built and published — massive organic search opportunity. Community has 5 posts + newsletter + 2 SVG cards ready to fire. Ensure Solana content is in the deployed batch.

STRATEGIC NOTE: Day 71 — 53 agent runs producing $4,421 human-equivalent work at ~$0 marginal cost. Content machine is outproducing deploy capacity by 8 days. New Funding Rate Tracker is our first interactive tool in 5+ builds — important for retention metrics. 7 new OG images created for recently built guides = social sharing ready. The Tokenized Treasuries guide positions us in RWA ($12B+ on-chain), one of the fastest-growing crypto verticals. Critical path remains git locks → deploy.
